content:
In the past two years I've helped over 500 clients set up the MyLIC app, and the most common feedback I get is: 'Ajay sir, why didn't I do this earlier?' The app handles nearly everything you'd otherwise need to visit a branch for. Here's the complete setup and usage guide for 2026.

Downloading the app is straightforward. On Android, search 'MyLIC' on the Google Play Store and install the app published by Life Insurance Corporation of India. On iPhone, the same app is on the App Store. Avoid any app that isn't published directly by LIC, as there are lookalike fraudulent apps in circulation.

Registration requires three things: your LIC policy number (it's on your premium receipt or policy bond), your date of birth, and your registered mobile number. Open the app, tap 'New User Registration', enter your policy number and date of birth, and LIC sends an OTP to your registered mobile. Enter the OTP, set a four-digit MPIN, and you're in. If your mobile number isn't registered with LIC, you'll need to visit a branch once to update it before you can complete registration.

Once registered, you see a dashboard with all your active policies. The most-used features are these. Premium payment: tap your policy, then 'Pay Premium', and choose between UPI, net banking, debit card, or credit card. The receipt comes by email within minutes. Policy status: the dashboard shows your next due date, sum assured, accumulated bonus, and surrender value for each policy. Loan against policy: tap 'Loan', check your eligibility (the app calculates this automatically based on surrender value), and submit an application. The loan is disbursed to your bank account within 3 to 5 working days. Policy revival: if your policy has lapsed, tap 'Revival', check the outstanding premium plus interest amount, and pay online.

Three common errors people run into. First, 'Policy not found': this usually means the policy number entered has an extra space or a digit is wrong. Double-check your policy bond. Second, 'Mobile number not registered': visit your LIC branch with your policy bond and Aadhaar to update your number in 10 minutes. Third, app login fails repeatedly: clear the app cache, force-close it, and try again. If it still fails, uninstall and reinstall.

The nominee update feature deserves a special mention. You can update or add nominees directly in the app under 'Service Requests'. This is something I strongly recommend every policyholder do once a year, because outdated nominees cause delays during claims.

Having trouble setting it up? Call me at 9415313434. I've walked through this process with hundreds of clients over the phone and can get you sorted in under 10 minutes.

Use our free [Surrender Value Calculator](/calculators/surrender-value) to calculate your own numbers.
contentHi:
MyLIC ऐप से आप प्रीमियम भुगतान, पॉलिसी स्टेटस, लोन आवेदन और नॉमिनी अपडेट घर बैठे कर सकते हैं। मैंने 500+ ग्राहकों को यह सेटअप करने में मदद की है।

रजिस्ट्रेशन के लिए चाहिए: पॉलिसी नंबर, जन्म तिथि, रजिस्टर्ड मोबाइल नंबर। अगर मोबाइल नंबर LIC में रजिस्टर नहीं है, तो पहले शाखा में जाएं। सेटअप में दिक्कत हो तो अजय सर को 9415313434 पर कॉल करें।
